title: Dallas Heat Wave
lead: Dallas is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.74. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Dallas is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 49%, and the wind speed is moderate at 10.8 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating, while the CDD value suggests a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
